message.content:
You are reviewing a pull request for SP_0007.2 — Form State Action Handlers (setValue, setComputed, useAll).

Context: This is part of an SDUI (Server Driven UI) action handler system for a React Native micro-frontend. The action handlers allow SDUI screens to manage form state declaratively via JSON action descriptors.

Files to review:
1. src/services/sdui/actions/formState.ts — the 3 handlers
2. src/services/sdui/actions/formState.test.ts — 23 unit tests
3. src/services/sdui/actions/registry.ts — registration in default registry
4. src/services/sdui/actions/index.ts — barrel export
5. src/__stories__/SDUIFormStateActions.stories.tsx — Storybook demo

Review criteria:
- BUGs: Logic errors, edge cases, race conditions
- SECURITY: Prototype pollution, injection risks in setAtPath/getAtPath
- STYLE: Consistency with existing handlers (navigation.ts pattern)
- TESTS: Coverage gaps, missing edge cases
- TYPES: Type safety, any/unknown usage

For each finding use: [BUG-N], [WARN-N], [NIT-N], [APPROVE]
Rate: APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES / NEEDS_DISCUSSION

Read each file and provide detailed review.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll review the PR for SP_0007.2 — Form State Action Handlers. Let me read all the relevant files.

content.text: Now let me check the navigation.ts pattern to understand consistency, and review the supporting utilities (jsonLogic and interpolation).
